theme.rationale: Medical and health applications require trust, warmth, and calm. Instead of generic clinical teals, we use an organic Sage/Deep Pine paired with Warm Ivory to create a grounded, premium, and comforting experience. The visual language evolves across life stages to match the user's cognitive and emotional maturity.

rules.heading_weight: font-black for high impact headers, font-medium for subtle subsection headers
rules.alignment: Always left-align long paragraphs and form inputs. Center-align only playful child stage elements or key hero metrics.
rules.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for body text. Use APCA guidelines for critical medical data.

buttons.child: rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-black shadow-[0_8px_0_#C8664D] active:shadow-[0_2px_0_#C8664D] active:translate-y-2 transition-all bg-[#E07A5F] text-white
buttons.teen: rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-semibold bg-[#52796F] text-white hover:bg-[#3E5C54] transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.adult: rounded-lg px-5 py-2.5 font-medium bg-[#234233] text-white hover:bg-[#1A3226] transition-colors border border-transparent shadow-sm

cards.child: rounded-3xl bg-white border-4 border-[#F3E8D6] shadow-[0_12px_32px_rgba(224,122,95,0.1)] p-8
cards.teen: rounded-2xl bg-white border border-[#DCE3E0] shadow-sm p-6 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.adult: rounded-lg bg-white border border-[#E5E7E4] shadow-none p-5

ai_disclaimer_banner.container: rounded-lg bg-[#FFF9EC] border border-[#F4D08C] p-4 flex items-start gap-4

badges.child: bg-[#FFF0EB] text-[#E07A5F] rounded-full px-4 py-1.5 text-sm font-bold
badges.teen: bg-[#EEF2F1] text-[#52796F] rounded-md px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider
badges.adult: bg-[#E9EFEA] text-[#2A5948] rounded px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium

mood_selector.item: flex-shrink-0 w-24 h-32 rounded-2xl border-2 border-transparent focus:border-[#E07A5F] flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-[#FDFBF7] snap-center cursor-pointer transition-transform hover:scale-105

vaccination_timeline.container: border-l-2 border-[#E5E7E4] ml-4 pl-6 relative space-y-8
vaccination_timeline.marker_completed: absolute -left-[9px] top-0 w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-[#4A7C59]
vaccination_timeline.marker_upcoming: absolute -left-[9px] top-0 w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-white border-2 border-[#D4A373]

layout_patterns.spacing_scale: Use generous padding: p-6 to p-12 for containers to provide breathing room.

parent_dashboard.usage: Multi-child cards span 4 cols. Key alerts span full row.

child_view.usage: Big tappable areas. Horizontal scrolling for 'Stories'.

teen_adult_view.usage: High density data tracking. AI Q&A takes col-span-2 or 3, logs take col-span-1 sidebars.

media.instructions: Use these precise URLs for implementation. Do not use generic placeholders. Add descriptive alt tags.

image_urls.description: Abstract sage and ivory background texture. Use as top header background for Parent and Adult dashboards with a mask-image fade.
Playful 3D soft clay shapes. Use these transparent assets decorating the edges of the Child interface (My Body, My Feelings).
Authentic Indian family. Use on the Authentication/Signup page (half-screen layout).
Happy Indian teenager studying. Use as the hero image for the Teen 'Puberty Basics & Education' section.

icons.stroke_width: 2.5 for child (chunky), 2 for teen, 1.5 for adult (precise)

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure AI Disclaimers text (#705435) on background (#FFF9EC) meets 4.5:1 ratio. Text over images must have a scrim/overlay (bg-black/30).
accessibility_and_testing.motion: Respect 'prefers-reduced-motion' for mood selector scaling and child big button presses.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: Add data-testid to ALL interactive buttons, AI forms, and navigation tabs. E.g., data-testid='login-submit-btn', data-testid='child-mood-[moodname]'

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement stage-based routing/views utilizing the specific color palettes and border-radii defined above.
NEVER use Shadcn Card component for the Child view. Build a custom `div` using the `components.cards.child` tailwind rules to ensure the playful, heavy-border look.
Shadcn components can be used for Adult/Parent views but MUST be customized (border-radius, shadow) to match the JSON.
For the AI Q&A section, always mount the AI Disclaimer Banner at the top of the chat area.
